title: Safekeep Provider Registry
description: Schema for providers.json — community-maintained AI provider key metadata

capability_group.description: Capability group this provider belongs to

category_label.description: Human-readable category label shown in the UI

capability.description: One sentence — what does this provider do for an AI app?

env_var.description: Primary environment variable name for this key

env_var_secondary.description: Additional env vars required (e.g. AWS key pair)

format_hint.description: Key prefix or pattern hint, e.g. 'sk-ant-...'

format_regex.description: Regex to validate key format client-side

get_key_url.description: Direct URL to the page where users create or copy their key

docs_url.description: URL to the authentication/API key documentation

health_check_url.description: Endpoint to call to verify the key is valid

health_check_headers.description: Headers to include in health check. Use {key} as placeholder for the API key.

free_tier.description: Plain-English description of the free tier, or null if none

free_tier_limit.description: Numeric limit of the free tier

free_tier_unit.description: Unit for free_tier_limit: searches, tokens, requests, etc.

requires_card.description: True if a credit card is required even for the free tier

expires.description: True if keys expire by default

alternatives.description: Other provider slugs in the same capability_group that serve the same purpose

accessible_outside_china.description: For Chinese providers: true if API works from non-China IP without VPN

english_portal.description: For Chinese providers: true if key management console is in English

_research_note.description: Internal note for maintainers — not shown in UI
